# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] App runs locally
- [ ] No plaintext passwords
- [ ] No float money calculations
- [ ] Database migrations are safe
- [ ] No destructive user data changes
- [ ] UI logic remains separate from business logic
- [ ] Tests added or updated if needed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Screenshots added if UI changed

## Notes

Include migration notes, testing notes, screenshots, or follow-up work here.
